name: golang-github-sagikazarmark-locafero-dev
title: golang-github-sagikazarmark-locafero-dev
description:
Go finder library for Afero
Library for finding files and directories using Afero, a filesystem
framework providing a simple, uniform and universal API interacting
with any filesystem, as an abstraction layer providing interfaces,
types and methods (https://github.com/spf13/afero).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-sagikazarmark-locafero-dev because Go finder library for Afero.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-sagikazarmark-locafero-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-sagikazarmark-locafero-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-sagikazarmark-locafero-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
